Description: Phone-OTP registration for workers and employers (no Aadhaar). Three login methods post-registration: phone+OTP, email+password, Google OAuth. Admin login is email+password only. See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M1.
Edit seeker / employer profile data after registration — photo, experience, skills, documents, company details. See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M2.
Employer creates/updates/activates/deactivates/expires job posts with rich fields. See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M3.
Two seeker-facing feeds — Recommended (profile-weighted) and Near By (GPS distance). Search + filter. See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M4.
Seeker applies with optional 2-min audio + optional text. See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M5.
Employer reviews applicants with tabs (All/Accepted/Shortlisted/Rejected/Bookmarked) + accept/reject/bookmark actions. See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M6.
Accept-with-modal flow + WhatsApp/SMS confirmation + 24h/2h reminders + day-after outcome capture. See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M7.
Seeker↔employer text + 60s audio, polling delivery (~10s). See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M8.
Five-channel matrix: in-app + FCM + WhatsApp + SMS + Email. See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M9.
Razorpay employer subscriptions per PROVISIONAL Option B (worker free, employer ₹999/mo, 14-day trial, manual renewal). See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M10.
Admin queues for Corporate-employer approval + document review + payment-status override. See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M11.
OpenAI omni-moderation + India scam regex + Send Warning + Delete. See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M12.
Admin sets isDeleted=true; auth middleware rejects deleted users; jobs disappear from feeds. See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M13.
Translate UI into EN/HI/TA/KN/ML/MR/GU/OR/TE/BN. EN+HI hard-gated to 100% by code freeze. See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M14.
FE port/path/auth reconciliation + security gaps + decision-tag convention + CI + staging + perf gate. See docs/managerial/04-prd-v1.md M15.
Delete AadhaarVerification model, validator, send/verify endpoints, aadhaarNumber on User, route registrations. RTM: M1-AC10, M15-AC4 #9. Verified by Asrar 2026-05-11 — 9/9 tests pass.
